channel.title: +MT on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +MT on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Meteoric impacts
item.description: Source: tw Was looking at records of meteoritic impacts in India. Wonder how many of the falls have been preserved. 1800 CE shortly after the English conquest of the tyrant of Mysuru a fall was reported at shrIrangapattana which is was said to be “the size of an elephant”: Exaggeration ? Dec 19th 1798 CE the vArANasi fall – a loud explosion was heard; several falling bodies were heard crashing to the ground.
